seoDescription: Review eligibility, process, and timelines for credit and subscription refund requests on deAPI.

elements.text: This policy explains when refunds may apply and how to submit requests with the required billing details.

hero.heading: Refund Policy
hero.body: Understand eligibility windows, review criteria, and processing timelines for billing-related refunds.

sections.title: Refund Eligibility
sections.body: Eligibility depends on purchase type, usage status, and timing of the request.

cards.title: Unused Credits
cards.description: Unused prepaid credits may be eligible within applicable review windows.

cards.title: Subscription Charges
cards.description: Subscription charge disputes are evaluated based on account activity and billing records.

cards.title: Incident Cases
cards.description: Verified platform incidents may qualify for remediation under policy terms.

sections.title: Request and Review Process
sections.body: Submit requests with account and invoice details so our billing team can verify quickly.

cards.title: Required Information
cards.description: Include account email, invoice ID, and a concise reason for the request.

cards.title: Review Timeline
cards.description: Most requests are reviewed within one to three business days.

cards.title: Resolution Details
cards.description: Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method when possible.

contactPanel.heading: Need help with a billing dispute?
contactPanel.body: Our billing support team can review refund eligibility and required documentation.
contactPanel.responseTime: Billing inquiries answered in one business day
